title: croton guatemalensis
intro: Croton guatemalensis, also known as the Mexican torch or Guatemala croton, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can aid in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Croton guatemalensis involve boiling the leaves in water to create a tea or infusing the plant in oil to create a topical treatment for skin and wound care.
